Package de.uka.ilkd.key.java.expression

Class Literal

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaSourceElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaProgramElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.expression.Literal
All Implemented Interfaces:
Expression, ModelElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, TerminalProgramElement, SVSubstitute
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractIntegerLiteral, BooleanLiteral, DoubleLiteral, EmptyMapLiteral, EmptySeqLiteral, EmptySetLiteral, FloatLiteral, FreeLiteral, NullLiteral, RealLiteral, StringLiteral
public abstract class Literal extends JavaProgramElement implements Expression, TerminalProgramElement
Literal.

  • Method Details

    • getKeYJavaType

      public KeYJavaType getKeYJavaType(Services javaServ, ExecutionContext ec)
      retrieves the literal's type (as it is independant of the execution context, it is same as using getKeYJavaType(Services))
      Specified by:
      getKeYJavaType in interface Expression
      Parameters:
      javaServ - the Services offering access to the Java model
      ec - the ExecutionContext in which the expression is evaluated
      Returns:
      the literal's type

    • getKeYJavaType

      public abstract KeYJavaType getKeYJavaType(Services javaServ)
      retrieves the literal's type
      Parameters:
      javaServ - the Services offering access to the Java model
      Returns:
      the literal's type

    • match

      public MatchConditions match(SourceData source, MatchConditions matchCond)
      Description copied from interface: ProgramElement
      matches the source "text" (@link SourceData#getSource()) against the pattern represented by this object. In case of a successful match the resulting MatchConditions with the found instantiations of the schemavariables. If the match failed, null is returned instead.
      Specified by:
      match in interface ProgramElement
      Overrides:
      match in class JavaProgramElement
      Parameters:
      source - the SourceData with the program element to match
      matchCond - the MatchConditions found up to this point
      Returns:
      the resulting match conditions or null if the match failed

    • getLDTName

      public abstract Name getLDTName()
